summary: Complete frontend testing of QGenie 2.0 app. All 20 test scenarios passed. Login, projects, 3-panel layout, all 5 modules, chatbot, admin panel, demo mode - all working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Quick login buttons only fill credentials but do NOT auto-submit. User must still click Sign In manually. This is a minor UX issue - the button text implies it will log you in directly.

issues: Light mode only - no dark background on projects page unlike the login/project views which have dark theme. Minor inconsistency.

action_items: LOW: Quick login buttons could optionally auto-submit the form for better UX (currently only fills credentials)
critical_code_review_comments: demoMode persisted in localStorage - if user previously had demoMode=false saved, login would fail with cryptic error. Consider always defaulting to DEMO_MODE_DEFAULT on fresh visits.
No loading state shown during Tosca conversion step progress - UI freezes for ~5 seconds then shows result
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Login requires clearing localStorage if demoMode was previously persisted as false. Use: await page.evaluate('localStorage.clear()') then reload before each test session. Admin: admin@tdbank.com/admin123. User: user@tdbank.com/test123. All APIs are MOCKED via demo-data.js.
mocked_apis: ALL APIs are MOCKED - login, projects, jobs, module outputs, chatbot responses all served from demo-data.js
tests_passed: Login page loads with demo credentials section
Admin login (admin@tdbank.com/admin123) works and redirects to /projects
Projects page shows 3 demo projects: TD Digital Banking, TD Wealth Management, TD Retail Banking
Opening project navigates to /projects/proj-1 with sidebar+topbar+chatbot panel
Sidebar shows all 5 module nav items: Dashboard, Tosca Conversion, Test Generation, Failure RCA, Impact Analysis, Regression Optimizer
Project dashboard shows 5 module cards and recent jobs table
TopBar shows project selector (TD Digital Banking), Demo ON badge, dark mode toggle, notification bell, user avatar (AJ)
Dark mode toggle works (moon icon toggles dark class)
Demo mode toggle shows Demo ON/OFF correctly
Tosca module page loads with file dropzone, framework radio, browser select, run button
Tosca Run Conversion shows step progress and output
Test Generation module loads with Jira story content
RCA module loads with pipeline run ID input
Impact Analysis module loads with commit SHA input
Regression Optimizer module loads with suite selector
Chatbot panel shows KB/File/Repo context tabs and chat input
Chatbot send works and shows response
Admin panel accessible from user menu (AJ avatar) for admin user
Admin panel shows Users and Projects tabs with data tables
User login (user@tdbank.com/test123) works; admin panel access is restricted (redirects to /projects)
